task_completion.description: The agent views the migration specification file to understand the required changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/migration_spec.md'.

task_completion.description: The agent logs into the Rancher dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Rancher UI dashboard, logged in at 'https://localhost'.

task_completion.description: The agent creates a Service and Endpoints for the Oracle RAC database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI or terminal showing the creation of a Service and Endpoints (or a Service without selectors) in the 'retail-system' namespace, pointing to IPs 10.50.2.100 and 10.50.2.101 on port 1521.

task_completion.description: The agent creates an ExternalName Service for the Stripe API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI or terminal showing the creation of a Service of type ExternalName in the 'retail-system' namespace, pointing to the external domain 'api.stripe.com'.

task_completion.description: The agent updates the 'inventory-api' deployment to use the new internal DNS names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rancher UI or terminal showing the environment variables of the 'inventory-api' deployment in the 'retail-system' namespace being updated to use the newly created Service names instead of the hardcoded IPs and external domain.

integrity.description: The agent applies the changes to the Kubernetes cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the Rancher UI to save/create resources, or runs 'kubectl apply' / 'kubectl edit' in the terminal, rather than just writing YAML files without applying them.

integrity.description: The updated deployment no longer contains hardcoded external IPs or domains.
integrity.visual_evidence: The environment variables for the 'inventory-api' deployment show internal Kubernetes DNS names instead of 10.50.2.100, 10.50.2.101, or api.stripe.com.

integrity.description: The agent creates the resources in the correct namespace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Services, Endpoints, and Deployment updates are all performed within the 'retail-system' namespace, as visible in the Rancher UI namespace selector or kubectl commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: retail-system. Oracle RAC IPs to abstract: 10.50.2.100, 10.50.2.101. Oracle Port: 1521. Stripe Domain to abstract: api.stripe.com. The agent must create Services/Endpoints for these and update the 'inventory-api' deployment to use the new internal DNS names.
